title: SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER - 211info
text: IONE COMMUNITY CLINIC SBHC SCHOOL BASED HEALTH CENTER Print & Share X Print & Share Print PDF Services include routine physical exams and sports physicals, treatment of illness and injury, vision and hearing screenings, blood pressure screenings, immunizations, mental health services, age-appropriate reproductive health, routine lab tests, prescription medication maintenance, and health, fitness, and nutrition education and promotion. 365 W 3rd Street Ione, OR 97843 Eligibility: Varies, call for information. Some SBHC are for students and staff only, others are for all children 0-19 in the school district, and others are open to the general public. Hours: Patient Clinic: Monday/Tuesday/Thursday 8am-5pm Morrow County Public Health Department: Wednesday 9am-3pm Community Counseling Solutions: Monday-Wednesday 8am-3:30pm (541) 422-7128 Get Directions Visit Website Phone/FAX Numbers Main phone (541) 422-7128 INTAKE PROCEDURE: Call for appointment FEES: Accepts OHP, some private insurances and sliding scale fees available. Students will not be turned away for inability to pay. DOCUMENTS: Insurance information, if applicable. Income information for those applying for sliding scale fees. LANGUAGES: English, Spanish AREA SERVED: Morrow County SITE HOURS: Monday-Thursday 8m-5pm Services: Childhood Immunization Mental Health Evaluation * Grade School Students Sports Participation Physical Examinations Student Health Programs Vaccine Information Other Services Offered At This Location: HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CLINIC HUMAN REPRODUCTION - OREGON REPRODUCTIVE HEALTH PROGRAM CONTRACEPTIVE CARE PROVIDER If you represent this agency, update your listing here . * The community resource directory information is up to date to the best of our knowledge. However, you should always call the provider to confirm this information and make an appointment. Be sure to confirm payment information with the provider, if payment is required. 211Info does not rate, recommend or endorse any agency. We simply provide information as a public service. IONE COMMUNITY CLINIC SBHC
